articles.title: Mi Hyang Lee has a bogey-free 66 to lead LPGA in China
articles.original_title: Mi Hyang Lee has a bogey-free 66 to lead LPGA in China
articles.summary: Mi Hyang Lee played bogey-free in windy conditions on Friday and posted a 6-under 66, giving her a one-shot lead in the Blue Bay LPGA going into the weekend as the South Korean chases her first LPGA title in more than eight years.  The wind wasn't as strong as what Lee faced in the opening round, and she managed to keep a clean card while making birdies on three of the four par 5s at Jian Lake Blue Bay.  Lee was one shot ahead of Yu Liu (66), the former Duke player who is trying to join Shanshan

articles.title: Iran won't compete at Milan Cortina Paralympics as its only athlete can't travel safely to Italy
articles.original_title: Iran won't compete at Milan Cortina Paralympics as its only athlete can't travel safely to Italy
articles.summary: CORTINA D'AMPEZZO, Italy (AP) — Iran will not participate in the Milan Cortina Paralympics because its only athlete set to compete can't safely travel to Italy amid the intensifying Middle East conflict, the International Paralympic Committee said Friday.  The announcement that Aboulfazl Khatibi won't compete came just hours ahead of the opening ceremony in Verona.  The Games are beginning less than a week since the United States and Israel launched a military attack against Iran.

articles.original_title: LeBron bests Kareem for most made FG in history
articles.summary: LeBron James made the 15,838th field goal of his career to pass Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most made field goals in NBA history.

articles.title: Despite rust, Young dazzles Wiz crowd in debut
articles.original_title: Despite rust, Young dazzles Wiz crowd in debut
articles.summary: In his limited time on the court, Trae Young proved in his Wizards debut that he is the type of player the team hasn't had since John Wall, thrilling the D.C. crowd and finishing with 12 points in a 122-112 loss to the Jazz.

articles.summary: Celtics superstar Jayson Tatum is expected to make his 2025-26 NBA season debut against the Dallas Mavericks on Friday night at TD Garden, sources told ESPN.

articles.title: Flagg return from injury spoiled by late Magic rally
articles.original_title: Flagg return from injury spoiled by late Magic rally
articles.summary: Cooper Flagg returned to the Dallas Mavericks' lineup Thursday night after missing eight games because of a left midfoot sprain and had 18 points and six assists in a 115-114 loss to the Orlando Magic.

articles.title: Ayton injures knee; LeBron (elbow) iffy for Friday
articles.original_title: Ayton injures knee; LeBron (elbow) iffy for Friday
articles.summary: Deandre Ayton left Thursday night's loss to the Nuggets with a knee injury, while LeBron James complained of a sore elbow afterward and said he wasn't sure of his status for Friday's game against the Pacers.
